audit_items.proof_trace: Lines 404-412 in `_getAssetPrice` evaluate zero after all price sources (Data Streams primary, Data Feed fallback) have been resolved, with no early returns possible before the check. When `withValidation=true`, `price == 0` unconditionally triggers `revert ZeroFeedData()`. All financial callers (`bid()`, `performUpkeep()`, `GPV2CompatibleAuction`) exclusively pass `withValidation=true`; `withValidation=false` is restricted to read-only view/preview functions that guard zero via the returned `isPriceValid` flag.
